Our story

Named for
Mette.

"The most meaningful moments are often the simplest: sharing a meal, enjoying a drink, meeting someone new."

M House is named in honour of our mother, Mette. The property was originally intended to become her home. Before she had the opportunity to move in, she sadly passed away.

We chose not to let the project become simply another property. Instead, we created a place that reflected the things she loved most: people, conversation, laughter, hospitality and bringing others together.

— Christian & family

Get in touch →
The spaces

More than
a hotel.

Gather in the courtyard, swim in the saltwater pool, stay in one of five rooms, work from our boutique lounge. M House is whatever you need it to be.

M House

What we offer

Five Rooms

Individually designed rooms in two restored traditional buildings. Each one uniquely its own.

Saltwater Pool

A Mediterranean oasis in the heart of the old town. Open to guests, day pass visitors and aperitivo guests.

Work Lounge

Hot desks, dedicated desks and meeting rooms. A hospitality-driven coworking space open 08:00–22:00.

Gatherings

Yaya's Corner, Breakfast & Swim, Sunrise Yoga, Water Yoga and daily Aperitivo. Always something happening.

Larnaka old town· Saltwater pool· Five rooms· Private events up to 150 guests· Work lounge· Aperitivo daily 17:00–19:00· Larnaka old town· Saltwater pool· Five rooms· Private events up to 150 guests· Work lounge· Aperitivo daily 17:00–19:00·
Gatherings

More than
a stay.

Curated experiences designed to bring people together. Book in advance. Capacity is limited by design.

01
Yaya's Corner
Seasonal recipes, stories and traditions shared by local Cypriot women.
02
Breakfast & Swim
A refreshing swim followed by a traditional Cypriot Boukoma breakfast.
03
Sunrise Yoga
A guided yoga session before the day begins, followed by pool access.
04
Water Yoga
Movement and mindfulness in and around the pool.
05
Aperitivo
Daily 17:00–19:00. Drinks and complimentary bites by the pool. Open to all.
All gatherings  →
Every evening at M House

Aperitivo.

17:00 – 19:00  ·  Daily  ·  All welcome

Inspired by the Italian tradition of gathering before dinner. Guests and visitors are invited to meet by the pool, enjoy a drink and receive complimentary aperitivo bites while watching the afternoon turn into evening.

Open to all Walk-ins welcome Reservations recommended
